details.output: Committed ed0f6936 (Unify controls menu design). Moved Update Refine into Management ahead of Guide while preserving its live status; rebuilt Command Palette and Report a bug as the same left-aligned icon/label rows used by management links; reset button-only shadow, alignment, weight, and hover differences; and rebuilt the white Controls trigger as a split control matching New Goal with equal height and a dedicated divided arrow segment. Added regression assertions for the split structure, management placement, and command-row design. Exact verification: cargo test --lib -- --test-threads=1 passed 454/454; cargo test --lib static_main_nav_ -- --nocapture passed 2/2; node --test tests/web_*.test.js passed 35/35; cargo fmt --all -- --check passed; git diff --check passed. Playwright render checks at 1440px and 390px measured Controls and New Goal at exactly 34px high, a 1px divider, white Controls background, 30px desktop and 28px narrow arrow segments, matching 32.296875px Command Palette/Guide row heights and left edges, no Command Palette button shadow, and successful palette opening from the restyled row. Worktree is clean.
